mapper.sql: scm.employee_id, scm.consolation_money_type, scm.application_date, scm.application_money, scm.relatives_died, scm.oa_order, scm.approval_date, scm.status, scm.approval_status, scm.current_node, scm.current_person, scm.export_flag, scm.released_money, scm.released_flag, scm.released_time, scm.id, scm.create_time, scm.create_by, scm.update_time, scm.update_by,scm.enabled_flag, scm.date, scm.pay_start_date, scm.pay_end_date, scm.child_name, scm.attribute1, scm.attribute2, scm.attribute3, scm.remarks, scm.relatives_died_relation, scm.spouse_name

${tAlias}.employee_id as ${tAlias}_employee_id, ${tAlias}.consolation_money_type as ${tAlias}_consolation_money_type, ${tAlias}.application_date as ${tAlias}_application_date, ${tAlias}.application_money as ${tAlias}_application_money, ${tAlias}.relatives_died as ${tAlias}_relatives_died, ${tAlias}.oa_order as ${tAlias}_oa_order, ${tAlias}.approval_date as ${tAlias}_approval_date, ${tAlias}.status as ${tAlias}_status, ${tAlias}.approval_status as ${tAlias}_approval_status, ${tAlias}.current_node as ${tAlias}_current_node, ${tAlias}.current_person as ${tAlias}_current_person, ${tAlias}.export_flag as ${tAlias}_export_flag, ${tAlias}.released_money as ${tAlias}_released_money, ${tAlias}.released_flag as ${tAlias}_released_flag, ${tAlias}.released_time as ${tAlias}_released_time, ${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.date as ${tAlias}_date, ${tAlias}.pay_start_date as ${tAlias}_pay_start_date, ${tAlias}.pay_end_date as ${tAlias}_pay_end_date, ${tAlias}.attribute1 as ${tAlias}_attribute1, ${tAlias}.attribute2 as ${tAlias}_attribute2, ${tAlias}.attribute3 as ${tAlias}_attribute3, ${tAlias}.remarks as ${tAlias}_remarks, ${tAlias}.relatives_died_relation as ${tAlias}_relatives_died_relation, ${tAlias}.spouse_name as ${tAlias}_spouse_name

select
, pe.work_card as work_card, pe.name as name, fdev.ext_dept_name as dept_name, fdev.ext_department_name as department_name, fdev.ext_team_name as team_name, pe.leave_flag as leave_flag from swm_consolation_money scm join pm_employee pe on pe.id = scm.employee_id and pe.enabled_flag = 1 join pm_employee_job pej on pej.employee_id = pe.id and pej.enabled_flag = 1 and pej.job_main_flag = 1 left outer join fnd_dept_ext_v fdev on pej.dept_id = fdev.id and fdev.deleted_flag = 0 where 1 = 1

when.test: criteria.employeeId != null and criteria.deptIds != null and criteria.deptIds.size > 0

if.test: criteria.value != null and criteria.value != '' and criteria.colName != '' and criteria.symbol != ''
item.value != null and item.colValue != '' and item.symbol != ''

mapper.insert: insert into swm_consolation_money (employee_id, consolation_money_type, application_date, application_money, relatives_died, oa_order, approval_date, status, approval_status, current_node, current_person, export_flag, released_money, released_flag, released_time, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by, enabled_flag, date, pay_start_date, pay_end_date, child_name, attribute1, attribute2, attribute3, remarks, relatives_died_relation,spouse_name ) values (#{employeeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{consolationMoneyType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{applicationDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{applicationMoney,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{relativesDied,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{oaOrder,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{approvalDate,jdbcType=DATE}, '等待审批', #{approvalStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{currentNode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{currentPerson,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 0, #{releasedMoney,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, 0, #{releasedTime,jdbcType=DATE}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, 1, #{date, jdbcType = DATE}, #{payStartDate, jdbcType = DATE}, #{payEndDate, jdbcType = DATE}, #{childName, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, #{attribute1, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, #{attribute2, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, #{attribute3, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, #{remarks, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, #{relativesDiedRelation, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{spouseName, jdbcType = VARCHAR} )
mapper.update: update swm_consolation_money set enabled_flag = 0 where id = #{id, jdbcType = BIGINT}

update swm_consolation_money set update_time = getdate(), update_by = #{updateBy, jdbcType = BIGINT}, released_time = #{criteria.releasedTime, jdbcType=DATE}, export_flag = 1, status = '发放审批中' from swm_consolation_money scm where scm.enabled_flag = 1 and scm.status = '等待导出'
mapper.insert: insert into swm_consolation_money ( employee_id, consolation_money_type, application_date, application_money, relatives_died, status, export_flag, released_money, released_flag, released_time, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by, enabled_flag, date, pay_start_date, pay_end_date, child_name, attribute1,remarks ) select scmi.employee_id, scmi.consolation_money_type, scmi.application_date,scmi.application_money, scmi.relatives_died, '发放完毕', 1, scmi.released_money, 1, scmi.released_time, getdate(), scmi.create_by, getdate(), scmi.update_by,1, scmi.date, case when scmi.date != null and scmi.consolation_money_type = '子女幼托费' then DATEADD(yyyy,2 , scmi.date) else null end, case when scmi.date != null and scmi.consolation_money_type = '子女幼托费' then DATEADD(yyyy,13 , scmi.date) else null end, scmi.child_name, '历史数据', scmi.remarks from swm_consolation_money_interface scmi where scmi.group_id = #{groupId, jdbcType = BIGINT} and scmi.data_status = 'T'

update scm set scm.status = '发放完毕', scm.export_flag = 1, scm.released_money = scmi.released_money, scm.released_flag = 1, scm.released_time = scmi.released_time, scm.update_time = scmi.update_time, scm.update_by = scmi.update_by from swm_consolation_money_interface scmi join swm_consolation_money scm on scmi.employee_id = scm.employee_id and scmi.consolation_money_type = scm.consolation_money_type and scmi.application_date = scm.application_date and scmi.application_money = scm.application_money and scmi.group_id = #{groupId, jdbcType = BIGINT} and scmi.data_status = 'T'
mapper.update: update swm_consolation_money set released_flag = 1, released_money = #{releasedMoney, jdbcType = DECIMAL}, status = '发放完毕', update_time = getDate(), update_by = #{updateBy, jdbcType = BIGINT} where id = #{id, jdbcType = BIGINT}
update swm_consolation_money set released_flag = 0, status = '发放审批不通过', released_time = null, update_time = getDate(), update_by = #{updateBy, jdbcType = BIGINT} where id = #{id, jdbcType = BIGINT}
update swm_consolation_money set export_flag = 0, status = '等待导出', released_time = null, update_by = #{updateBy, jdbcType = BIGINT}, update_time = getDate() where id = #{id, jdbcType = BIGINT}

update swm_consolation_money set export_flag = 0, status = '等待导出', released_time = null, update_by = #{updateBy, jdbcType = BIGINT}, update_time = getDate() where id in
#{item, jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select case when exists (select 1 from swm_consolation_money scm_t where scm_t.enabled_flag = 1 and scm_t.employee_id = scm.employee_id and scm_t.consolation_money_type = '子女诞辰') then 0 else 1 end as create_flag from swm_consolation_money scm where scm.id = #{id, jdbcType = BIGINT} and scm.enabled_flag = 1

select
, pe.work_card as work_card, pe.name as name, fdev.ext_dept_name as dept_name, fdev.ext_department_name as department_name, fdev.ext_team_name as team_name, pe.leave_flag as leave_flag from swm_consolation_money scm join pm_employee pe on pe.id = scm.employee_id and pe.enabled_flag = 1 join pm_employee_job pej on pej.employee_id = pe.id and pej.enabled_flag = 1 and pej.job_main_flag = 1 left outer join fnd_dept_ext_v fdev on pej.dept_id = fdev.id and fdev.deleted_flag = 0 where scm.oa_order = #{oaOrder, jdbcType = VARCHAR}
mapper.update: update scm set scm.date = isnull(sfci.date, scm.date), scm.child_name = isnull(sfci.child_name, scm.child_name), scm.pay_start_date = case when sfci.date != null then dateadd(yyyy, 2, sfci.date) else scm.pay_start_date end, scm.pay_end_date = case when sfci.date != null then DATEADD(yyyy, 13, sfci.date) else scm.pay_end_date end from swm_consolation_money scm join pm_employee pe on scm.employee_id = pe.id and pe.enabled_flag = 1 and scm.enabled_flag = 1 left join swm_first_child_interface sfci on pe.work_card = sfci.work_card and pe.name = sfci.name where sfci.data_status = 'T' and sfci.date is not null and sfci.group_id = 1 and (scm.consolation_money_type = '子女幼托费' || scm.consolation_money_type = '子女诞辰' )
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO swm_consolation_money ( employee_id, consolation_money_type, application_date, application_money, relatives_died, STATUS, export_flag, released_money, released_flag, released_time, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by, enabled_flag, DATE, pay_start_date, pay_end_date, child_name, attribute1, remarks, approval_status ) SELECT target.employee_id, target.consolation_money_type, getdate( ), target.application_money, NULL, '等待导出', 0, NULL, 0, NULL, getdate( ), - 1, getdate( ), - 1, 1, target.date, target.pay_start_date, target.pay_end_date, target.child_name, '系统自动生成的子女幼托', NULL, 'pass' FROM ( SELECT temp.* FROM ( SELECT scm.*, ROW_NUMBER ( ) OVER ( PARTITION BY scm.employee_id, scm.consolation_money_type ORDER BY isnull(scm.released_time, getdate()) DESC ) rn FROM swm_consolation_money scm WHERE scm.consolation_money_type = '子女幼托费' AND scm.enabled_flag = 1 and scm.status = '发放完毕' and scm.approval_status = 'pass' and EXISTS(select 1 from pm_employee pe where pe.id = scm.employee_id and pe.enabled_flag = 1 and pe.leave_flag = 0) ) temp WHERE convert(varchar(10), getdate(),120) >= case when month(temp.create_time) < 7 then convert(varchar(10), convert(varchar(4),year(getdate())) + '-07-01', 120) else convert(varchar(10), convert(varchar(4), year(getdate()) + 1) + '-01-01', 120) end ) AS target join pm_employee pe on pe.id = target.employee_id and pe.enabled_flag = 1 and pe.leave_flag = 0 WHERE target.pay_end_date >= convert(varchar(10),dateADD( mm, - 6, getdate( ) ),120) AND target.pay_end_date IS NOT NULL and target.pay_start_date <= convert(varchar(10), getdate(), 120)

insert into swm_consolation_money( employee_id, consolation_money_type, application_date, application_money, relatives_died, status, export_flag, released_money, released_flag, released_time, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by, enabled_flag, date, pay_start_date, pay_end_date, child_name, attribute1,remarks ) select temp.employee_id, '子女幼托费', getdate(), 150, null , '等待导出', 0, null, 0, null , getdate(), -1, getdate(), -1 , 1 , temp.date, temp.pay_start_date, temp.pay_end_date, temp.child_name, '只有子女诞辰的情况下，系统自动生成的子女幼托', null from ( select scm_t.* from swm_consolation_money scm_t where scm_t.enabled_flag = 1 and scm_t.consolation_money_type = '子女诞辰' and scm_t.pay_start_date is not null and scm_t.status = '发放完毕' and scm_t.approval_status = 'pass' and EXISTS(select 1 from pm_employee pe where pe.id = scm_t.employee_id and pe.enabled_flag = 1 and pe.leave_flag = 0)
and convert(varchar(10), getdate(), 120) >= scm_t.pay_start_date and convert(varchar(10), getdate(), 120) <= scm_t.pay_end_date and not EXISTS ( select 1 from swm_consolation_money scm where scm.enabled_flag = 1 and scm.consolation_money_type = '子女幼托费' and scm.employee_id = scm_t.employee_id ) ) temp join pm_employee pe on pe.id = temp.employee_id and pe.enabled_flag = 1 and pe.leave_flag = 0
